subcodes.first_line: Verily, the truly learned is he who hath recognized the Known One when He came with His name, the Self-Subsisting, and the mystic is he who hath hastened unto the Sought-After one when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان العالم من عرف المعلوم اذ اتی باسمه القیوم و العارف من سرع الی المعروف اذ
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
